char_status: Member of 表盘, Owner of 颠茄
char_overview: Running 颠茄 Bar, where secrets flow freer than liquor.
char_looks: Short green hair. Green eyes, with a flirtatious and provocative gaze. White shirt under black jacket, black long skirt, gemstone bowknot at collar. None. Uses 潜渊 mainly for intimidation and escape, though capable of combat when pressed
char_abilities: 灵力回路-潜渊: Envelops herself in black 灵力, taking the form of a fanged monster that instills visceral fear in onlookers. Can shift short distances through shadows, used primarily for intimidation and escape.
